title: daphne bholua var. bholua
intro: Daphne bholua var. bholua, also known as Himalayan daphne, is a plant species native to the Himalayan regions and is characterized by its fragrant white flowers and glossy evergreen leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Daphne bholua var. bholua include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. Daphne bholua var. bholua is used in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
